text: Commander IB PortfolioAnalyst report (2026-02-06 → 2026-04-27) Account: individual US equities scalper | Ending NAV $2,084.55 Cumulative TWR: +35.03% | Sharpe 2.81 | Max DD 7.94% Trading P&L (MTM): +$1,108.31 | Fees: −$317.20 (29% of MTM) Turnover ~$73,789 bought / $74,900 sold | Ended 100% cash (flat) KEY DISTINCTION FOR HALIM: - Commander's "lottery" trades were NOT random gambling — calculated setups with ~80–97% conviction. - Failures were human EXECUTION errors (hope-hold, late exit) on specific TRIPS — never blacklist a symbol. - PLUG lost one report trip (−9.29%) but commander profits same vol/energy class on other entries (USEG +3.21%). - Learn: EXIT bad trips fast; RE-ENTER same ticker when next 80%+ setup qualifies.
